title: Illuminated Cabinet Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale illuminated cabinet signs with LED technology. UL 48 listed, German-engineered quality. 3-week lead time for sign trade professionals.
heroSubtitle: High-impact illuminated cabinet signs engineered for durability and brilliance. Built exclusively for the sign trade with premium LED systems and UL 48 listed components.

sections.heading: Premium Illuminated Cabinet Signs for the Sign Trade
sections.content:
Illuminated cabinet signs remain one of the most versatile and cost-effective signage solutions for commercial applications. At Sunlite Signs, we manufacture wholesale illuminated cabinet signs that combine German-engineered precision with modern LED technology, giving your clients a product that delivers exceptional visibility day and night.

Our cabinet signs are constructed with heavy-gauge aluminum frames and retainer systems designed for long-term structural integrity. Every unit ships fully assembled and wired, ready for straightforward field installation. Whether your client needs a single-face wall-mounted unit or a double-face pole-mounted monument, our engineering team works with you to ensure the design meets local code requirements and site-specific wind load calculations.

As a wholesale-only manufacturer, we provide sign shops with direct access to factory pricing without middleman markups. Our complimentary engineering services cover structural calculations, electrical layouts, and permit-ready drawings — saving your team hours of design work on every project.

sections.heading: LED Technology and Energy Efficiency
sections.content:
Every Sunlite illuminated cabinet sign is powered by commercial-grade LED modules that deliver uniform face illumination while consuming a fraction of the energy required by legacy fluorescent systems. Our standard LED packages include:

  • High-output white LEDs rated at 50,000+ hours for maintenance-free operation
  • UL 48 listed power supplies with built-in surge protection for reliable field performance
  • Even light distribution achieved through proprietary module spacing calculations
  • Remote driver access for simplified maintenance and component replacement

The shift from fluorescent to LED illumination reduces energy consumption by up to 60%, which translates directly into lower utility costs for your clients. Combined with our 3-week standard production timeline, you can quote and deliver illuminated cabinet signs faster than most competitors can process an order.

sections.heading: Customization and Ordering
sections.content:
Sunlite Signs offers full customization on every illuminated cabinet sign order. Choose from single-face or double-face configurations, wall-mount or pole-mount frames, and a range of standard and custom finish colors. Our production team handles everything from CNC-cut aluminum fabrication to vinyl application and final quality inspection.

To get started, submit your project specifications through our trade portal or contact your dedicated account representative. We provide detailed shop drawings for approval before any fabrication begins, ensuring your client sees exactly what they will receive. With our wholesale pricing model, you maintain healthy margins while offering your clients a premium, UL-listed product backed by Sunlite engineering.

faqs.question: What LED modules do you use in illuminated cabinet signs?
faqs.answer: We use commercial-grade, UL-recognized LED modules rated for 50,000+ hours of operation. Each module is selected for optimal brightness and spacing to ensure uniform face illumination across the entire sign surface.

faqs.question: Can I order illuminated cabinet signs in custom sizes?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every cabinet sign is built to your specifications. We manufacture units ranging from small wall-mounted signs to large pole-mounted cabinets exceeding 20 feet in length. Submit your dimensions and our engineering team will provide a detailed shop drawing.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for illuminated cabinet signs?
faqs.answer: Our standard production lead time is 3 weeks from approved shop drawing. Rush orders may be available depending on current production capacity — contact your account representative for expedited options.

faqs.question: Are your cabinet signs UL listed?
faqs.answer: Yes. All Sunlite illuminated cabinet signs are manufactured in compliance with UL 48 standards. Each sign ships with a UL label, ensuring it meets the electrical safety requirements demanded by inspectors and code enforcement.

title: Push-Through Letter Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale push-through letter signs with precision-routed faces and LED backlighting. German-engineered, UL 48 listed. 3-week delivery for sign pros.
heroSubtitle: Precision-routed push-through letter signs that combine the dimensional look of channel letters with the simplicity of cabinet construction. Trade-only pricing with complimentary engineering.

sections.heading: What Are Push-Through Letter Signs?
sections.content:
Push-through letter signs feature individually routed letterforms that are pushed through a precision-cut cabinet face, creating a dimensional, illuminated effect that stands out from standard flat-face cabinet signage. At Sunlite Signs, we manufacture push-through letter signs for the wholesale sign trade using CNC routing technology that ensures tight tolerances and clean edges on every character.

The construction process begins with CNC routing the cabinet face from aluminum composite material. Acrylic or polycarbonate letters are then fabricated to match each routed opening and pressed into place from behind. When illuminated by internal LED modules, each letter glows with a clean, even light that gives the sign a high-end, three-dimensional appearance without the cost or complexity of individual channel letters.

Push-through signs are an excellent upsell opportunity for sign shops. They deliver a premium look at a price point below individual channel letters, making them attractive for retail storefronts, restaurants, medical offices, and professional service businesses that want to stand out.

sections.heading: Manufacturing Process and Quality Standards
sections.content:
Sunlite Signs brings German-engineered precision to every push-through letter sign we produce. Our manufacturing process includes:

  • CNC routing with tolerances of +/- 0.010 inches for perfectly fitted letterforms
  • Cast acrylic letters available in a wide range of translucent and opaque colors
  • Aluminum cabinet construction with welded or mechanically fastened corners for structural integrity
  • UL 48 listed LED illumination systems with even light distribution across all characters

Every sign undergoes a full quality inspection before shipping, including a powered illumination test to verify uniform brightness and proper electrical function. Our complimentary engineering service includes structural analysis for wall-mounted and pole-mounted applications, ensuring your installation meets local building code requirements.

sections.heading: Ordering Push-Through Letter Signs Wholesale
sections.content:
Getting started with push-through letter signs from Sunlite is straightforward. Provide your project artwork, dimensions, and mounting specifications, and our team will generate detailed shop drawings for your review. We handle all engineering, including wind load calculations and electrical layouts, at no additional cost to our trade partners.

With a standard 3-week production timeline and competitive wholesale pricing, Sunlite Signs helps your shop deliver a premium product without the overhead of in-house fabrication. Each sign ships fully assembled, wired, and ready for field installation, reducing your labor costs and project timelines.

faqs.question: How do push-through letter signs compare to channel letters?
faqs.answer: Push-through letter signs offer a similar dimensional, illuminated appearance at a lower price point. They are constructed as a single cabinet unit with routed letterforms rather than individually fabricated channel letters, which reduces both manufacturing cost and installation complexity.

faqs.question: What letter materials are available for push-through signs?
faqs.answer: We use cast acrylic as our standard letter material, available in a wide range of translucent and opaque colors. Polycarbonate options are available for high-impact applications where additional durability is required.

faqs.question: Can push-through signs be double-faced?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manufacture both single-face and double-face push-through letter signs. Double-face units are commonly used for pole-mounted and projecting blade sign applications.

faqs.question: What finishes are available for the cabinet face?
faqs.answer: Cabinet faces can be finished in any standard or custom paint color. We also offer brushed aluminum, vinyl-wrapped, and digitally printed face options to match your client's branding requirements.

title: Flex Face Cabinet Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale flex face cabinet signs for large-format applications. Tensioned fabric faces, LED illumination, UL 48 listed. 3-week lead time for the sign trade.
heroSubtitle: Large-format flex face cabinet signs with tensioned fabric technology for seamless, vibrant graphics. Wholesale pricing and complimentary engineering for trade partners.

sections.heading: Flex Face Cabinet Signs for Large-Format Applications
sections.content:
Flex face cabinet signs are the preferred solution for large-format illuminated signage where a seamless, wrinkle-free graphic face is essential. At Sunlite Signs, we manufacture wholesale flex face cabinets using tensioned fabric and silicone edge retention systems that maintain a perfectly smooth face across spans exceeding 30 feet.

Unlike rigid polycarbonate or acrylic face panels, flex face materials accommodate thermal expansion and contraction without cracking or warping. This makes them ideal for large pylon signs, highway-visible monument signs, gas station canopy fascia, and multi-tenant shopping center identification signs where panel size would make rigid faces impractical.

Our German-engineered frame systems use extruded aluminum perimeter channels with silicone edge gasket retention. This allows graphics to be tensioned evenly across the entire face, eliminating the sagging and wrinkling common with older clamp-style retention systems. When faces need to be replaced for rebranding, the silicone edge system allows quick face changes without disassembling the cabinet.

sections.heading: Construction and Illumination Details
sections.content:
Sunlite flex face cabinets are built with structural aluminum frames welded to precise dimensions. Our standard construction features include:

  • Extruded aluminum retainer channels with silicone edge gasket retention for uniform tensioning
  • Internal LED module arrays spaced for even illumination across the entire face area
  • Removable rear access panels for simplified LED maintenance without face removal
  • Hot-dipped galvanized or powder-coated steel internal structural framing for large spans

Every flex face cabinet sign is UL 48 listed and ships with complete wiring and a UL label. Our complimentary engineering includes structural calculations, wind load analysis, and foundation specifications for pole-mounted or ground-mounted applications, giving your team everything needed for permit submission.

sections.heading: Wholesale Ordering for Sign Professionals
sections.content:
Sunlite Signs supplies flex face cabinet signs exclusively to the sign trade. Our wholesale model means your shop gets factory-direct pricing, allowing you to compete effectively on large-format projects while maintaining strong margins. We handle the heavy engineering and fabrication so your team can focus on sales and installation.

Submit your project requirements including dimensions, mounting type, and graphic artwork. Our team will return detailed shop drawings and a firm quote, typically within 48 hours. Standard production is 3 weeks from approved drawings, with the sign shipping fully fabricated, wired, and ready for crane installation. Replacement flex faces can be ordered separately for future rebranding projects.

faqs.question: What is the maximum size for a flex face cabinet sign?
faqs.answer: We routinely manufacture flex face cabinets exceeding 30 feet in length. For very large applications, cabinets can be designed in sections that bolt together in the field. Contact our engineering team with your project dimensions for specific guidance.

faqs.question: How long do flex face graphics last?
faqs.answer: Premium flex face materials are rated for 7-10 years of outdoor exposure with proper UV-resistant inks. Actual lifespan varies based on climate, sun exposure, and print quality. Replacement faces are easy to install thanks to the silicone edge retention system.

faqs.question: Can flex face cabinets be double-sided?
faqs.answer: Yes. Double-face flex face cabinets are common for pylon and monument sign applications. Each face is independently tensioned and illuminated, allowing different graphics on each side if needed.

faqs.question: Do you provide the printed flex face material?
faqs.answer: We supply cabinets with or without printed faces. Many sign shops prefer to print faces locally for faster turnaround on graphics. We provide exact face dimensions and silicone edge specifications so your printer can produce a perfectly fitted panel.

title: Gas Station Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale gas station signs and fuel station signage. UL 48 listed, brand-compliant construction with LED illumination. 3-week delivery for sign professionals.
heroSubtitle: Brand-compliant gas station signage manufactured to petroleum industry standards. UL 48 listed with LED illumination and engineered for high-wind environments.

sections.heading: Gas Station Signs Built to Petroleum Industry Standards
sections.content:
Gas station signage requires specialized engineering to meet both petroleum brand standards and local building code requirements. Sunlite Signs manufactures wholesale gas station signs that comply with major fuel brand image programs while delivering the durability and illumination performance your clients demand.

Our gas station sign portfolio includes canopy fascia signs, freestanding pylon identification signs, fuel price displays, and directional signage. Each product is engineered to withstand the demanding environmental conditions found at fuel stations, including high winds, temperature extremes, and continuous 24-hour illumination cycles.

As a wholesale manufacturer, we work directly with sign shops that service petroleum clients. Our team is experienced with the brand specification documents from major fuel companies and can ensure every sign meets the required dimensions, colors, and construction standards. This eliminates revision cycles and speeds up brand approval.

sections.heading: Engineering for Demanding Environments
sections.content:
Gas station signs face unique structural challenges. Canopy fascia signs must integrate with existing canopy structures while meeting wind load requirements. Freestanding pylons at fuel stations are often among the tallest signs in a commercial area, requiring detailed foundation engineering. Sunlite provides complimentary engineering services that address these challenges:

  • Wind load calculations per ASCE 7 standards for your specific project location
  • Structural integration plans for canopy-mounted signage with attachment details
  • Foundation specifications for freestanding pylon signs including pier depth and reinforcement
  • Electrical load calculations and circuit layouts for multi-sign installations

Every gas station sign is UL 48 listed and constructed with corrosion-resistant materials selected for long-term performance in outdoor environments. LED illumination systems are rated for 50,000+ hours, minimizing maintenance visits to active fuel station sites where work access can be complex.

sections.heading: Streamlined Ordering for Fuel Station Projects
sections.content:
Fuel station rebranding and new construction projects move on tight timelines. Sunlite Signs supports your shop with a 3-week standard production schedule and dedicated project coordination to keep multi-sign orders on track. We manufacture all sign types for a gas station project in parallel, ensuring everything arrives together for efficient installation.

Submit your brand specification documents and site survey data to get started. Our team will generate shop drawings for the complete sign package, including canopy signs, pylons, price displays, and directional signs. Wholesale pricing is provided on a per-project basis, with volume discounts available for multi-location rollout programs.

faqs.question: Do you manufacture signs for specific fuel brands?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manufacture signs compliant with major petroleum brand image programs. Provide your brand specification documents and our team will ensure every sign meets the required standards for dimensions, colors, materials, and construction methods.

faqs.question: Can you handle multi-location fuel station rollouts?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have production capacity for multi-location programs and offer volume pricing for rollout projects. Our project coordination team manages production scheduling across multiple sites to ensure on-time delivery for each location.

faqs.question: What materials are used for gas station canopy signs?
faqs.answer: Canopy fascia signs are typically constructed with aluminum frames and either flex face or polycarbonate face panels, depending on size and brand requirements. All components are corrosion-resistant and rated for continuous outdoor exposure.

faqs.question: Do your gas station signs meet UL requirements?
faqs.answer: Yes. All illuminated gas station signs are manufactured to UL 48 standards and ship with UL labels. This is critical for fuel station applications where electrical code compliance is strictly enforced.

title: Shopping Center Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale shopping center signs and multi-tenant identification signage. UL 48 listed, LED illuminated. German-engineered with 3-week production for the sign trade.
heroSubtitle: Multi-tenant shopping center signage engineered for maximum visibility and easy tenant panel changes. Wholesale pricing with complimentary structural engineering.

sections.heading: Shopping Center Signage for Commercial Properties
sections.content:
Shopping center signs serve a dual purpose: they identify the property to passing traffic and they provide individual tenant visibility that drives foot traffic to each business. Sunlite Signs manufactures wholesale shopping center signage systems designed to handle both requirements with a modular approach that simplifies tenant changes over the life of the sign.

Our shopping center sign products include freestanding multi-tenant pylon signs, monument identification signs, tenant directory panels, and building-mounted identification signs. Each product is engineered with modular tenant panel systems that allow individual panels to be swapped without disturbing adjacent tenants or requiring crane access for routine changes.

For sign shops that service commercial property management companies, shopping center signage represents a recurring revenue opportunity. Tenant turnover means regular panel replacement work, and our modular systems are specifically designed to make that process efficient for your installation crews.

sections.heading: Modular Design and Engineering
sections.content:
Sunlite shopping center signs are built with German-engineered modular systems that prioritize long-term serviceability. Key features include:

  • Slide-in tenant panel tracks that allow panel replacement from ground level or a standard lift
  • Standardized panel dimensions within each sign for efficient batch production of replacement panels
  • Independent LED illumination per tenant panel for individual on/off control
  • Structural aluminum framing designed for 20+ year service life in outdoor environments

Our complimentary engineering services include complete structural packages with foundation details, wind load calculations, and electrical layouts. For multi-sign property packages, we coordinate production of all signs simultaneously, ensuring consistent color matching and quality across every unit. All signs are UL 48 listed and shipped ready for installation.

sections.heading: Partnering with Property Management Companies
sections.content:
Sign shops that service commercial properties need a manufacturer that understands the business model. Sunlite Signs supports your trade business with fast turnaround on both complete sign packages and individual tenant panel replacements. Our 3-week standard lead time applies to full sign orders, while replacement tenant panels typically ship in 5-7 business days.

We provide your shop with technical documentation packages for each installed sign, including panel dimensions, material specifications, and color formulas. This ensures that future tenant panels match the original sign exactly, maintaining a professional appearance that keeps property managers satisfied and keeps your shop as their preferred vendor.

faqs.question: How quickly can replacement tenant panels be produced?
faqs.answer: Replacement tenant panels for existing Sunlite shopping center signs typically ship within 5-7 business days. We maintain production records for every sign, so reorders match the original specifications exactly.

faqs.question: Can shopping center signs accommodate different tenant panel sizes?
faqs.answer: Yes. While standardized panel dimensions simplify production, we can engineer multi-tenant signs with variable panel sizes to accommodate anchor tenants or premium positioning within the sign layout.

faqs.question: What illumination options are available?
faqs.answer: Standard illumination uses internal LED modules with individually controlled circuits per tenant panel. We also offer options for external LED spotlights and halo-illuminated cabinet configurations depending on the design requirements.

faqs.question: Do you provide engineering for monument signs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our complimentary engineering covers structural calculations, foundation specifications, and electrical layouts for monument-style shopping center signs. Permit-ready drawing packages are included at no additional cost.

faqs.question: Can existing shopping center signs be retrofitted with LED?
faqs.answer: We manufacture LED retrofit kits sized to fit existing cabinet dimensions. Provide your current sign measurements and our team will specify the correct LED module layout for even illumination across the face area.

title: Storefront Cabinet Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale storefront cabinet signs with LED illumination and custom finishes. UL 48 listed, German-engineered. 3-week lead time for sign trade professionals.
heroSubtitle: Wall-mounted storefront cabinet signs built for retail visibility. Custom sizes, finishes, and LED illumination options with trade-only wholesale pricing.

sections.heading: Storefront Cabinet Signs for Retail Applications
sections.content:
Storefront cabinet signs are the workhorse of retail signage. They provide excellent visibility, accommodate complex graphics, and offer a durable, weather-resistant enclosure for LED illumination systems. Sunlite Signs manufactures wholesale storefront cabinet signs in virtually any size and configuration, giving your sign shop the flexibility to serve retail clients across every market segment.

Our storefront cabinets are constructed with extruded aluminum frames and your choice of polycarbonate, acrylic, or flex face panels. Wall-mount brackets are engineered for the specific substrate and load requirements of each installation, and our complimentary engineering service includes attachment details for masonry, steel, and wood-frame structures.

Whether your client operates a single retail location or a multi-unit franchise, Sunlite provides consistent quality and competitive wholesale pricing that helps your shop win more business. Our 3-week production timeline means you can quote tight project schedules with confidence.

sections.heading: Design Flexibility and Finish Options
sections.content:
Retail clients expect signage that matches their brand identity precisely. Sunlite storefront cabinet signs offer extensive customization options:

  • Custom paint colors matched to PMS or brand specifications with automotive-grade finishes
  • Multiple face options including polycarbonate, acrylic, and digitally printed flex face materials
  • Dimensional elements such as push-through letters or applied logo elements for added depth
  • Shape versatility from standard rectangles to custom contoured cabinet profiles

All face graphics can be produced in-house by your shop using our provided face dimensions, or we can supply signs with applied vinyl graphics ready for installation. LED illumination is standard, with options for front-lit, edge-lit, and combination lighting configurations to achieve the look your client needs.

sections.heading: Streamlined Trade Ordering
sections.content:
Sunlite Signs makes ordering storefront cabinet signs simple for trade partners. Submit your project specifications through our portal and receive detailed shop drawings, typically within 48 hours. Our drawings include all dimensions, materials, finish colors, and mounting details for your review and client approval.

Once approved, production begins immediately with our standard 3-week timeline. Signs ship fully fabricated, wired, and tested with UL 48 labels applied. Your crew handles the field installation while we handle the engineering and manufacturing — a division of labor that lets your business scale without adding fabrication overhead.

faqs.question: What face materials are available for storefront cabinets?
faqs.answer: We offer polycarbonate, cast acrylic, and flex face options. Polycarbonate is our standard recommendation for durability and impact resistance. Cast acrylic provides excellent light transmission for premium applications. Flex face is ideal for larger signs or when seamless graphics are required.

faqs.question: Can storefront cabinet signs be shaped to match a custom logo?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manufacture custom-contoured cabinet signs that follow the outline of a logo or brand element. CNC routing allows us to produce virtually any profile shape while maintaining the structural integrity of the cabinet.

faqs.question: What mounting options are available?
faqs.answer: Standard mounting options include wall-mount brackets, raceway mount, and blade/projecting mount configurations. Our engineering team specifies the appropriate mounting hardware based on the installation substrate and sign weight.

faqs.question: Do you offer non-illuminated cabinet signs?
faqs.answer: Yes. While most storefront cabinets include LED illumination, we manufacture non-illuminated versions for applications where external lighting is preferred or where electrical service is not available at the sign location.

title: LED Cabinet Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale LED cabinet signs with commercial-grade modules and UL 48 listed components. German-engineered, 3-week delivery. Exclusive pricing for sign trade partners.
heroSubtitle: Commercial-grade LED cabinet signs engineered for uniform illumination and energy efficiency. Built for the sign trade with UL 48 listed components and wholesale pricing.

sections.heading: LED Cabinet Signs: The Modern Standard
sections.content:
LED technology has become the definitive standard for illuminated cabinet signage, replacing fluorescent systems across the industry. Sunlite Signs manufactures wholesale LED cabinet signs using commercial-grade modules and UL 48 listed power supplies that deliver superior performance, lower energy consumption, and dramatically reduced maintenance costs compared to legacy lighting systems.

Our LED cabinet signs are engineered with proprietary module spacing calculations that ensure even light distribution across the entire face area, eliminating the hot spots and dark bands that plague poorly designed LED installations. Whether the cabinet is 2 feet or 20 feet in length, every Sunlite LED sign delivers consistent, uniform brightness from edge to edge.

For sign shops transitioning clients from fluorescent to LED signage, we also manufacture LED retrofit kits designed to drop into existing cabinet dimensions. This allows your clients to upgrade their lighting technology without replacing the entire sign structure, creating a cost-effective upgrade path that generates new revenue for your business.

sections.heading: LED Technology Specifications
sections.content:
Sunlite Signs selects LED components based on proven field performance, not just spec sheet numbers. Our standard LED cabinet sign packages include:

  • Samsung or Nichia LED chips for consistent color temperature and lumen output
  • 50,000+ hour rated life at L70 maintenance factor for years of reliable operation
  • UL 48 listed power supplies with 90%+ efficiency ratings and built-in surge protection
  • IP65 rated modules for moisture resistance inside the cabinet environment
  • 5-year LED warranty covering both modules and power supplies

Our engineering team calculates the optimal module quantity, spacing, and set-back distance for each cabinet design. This technical approach eliminates guesswork and ensures your clients receive a sign that looks professional from day one, without the callbacks and adjustments that come from undersized or improperly spaced LED installations.

faqs.question: What LED brands do you use in cabinet signs?
faqs.answer: We use Samsung and Nichia LED chips as our standard options, selected for their proven reliability, consistent color temperature, and strong lumen maintenance ratings. Both brands are widely recognized for quality in the sign industry.

faqs.question: Can you retrofit existing fluorescent cabinet signs with LED?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manufacture LED retrofit kits sized to fit existing cabinet dimensions. Provide your current sign measurements and we will specify the correct module layout, power supply, and wiring configuration for a complete fluorescent-to-LED conversion.

faqs.question: What color temperatures are available?
faqs.answer: Standard color temperatures include 5000K (daylight), 6500K (cool white), and 4000K (neutral white). Custom color temperatures and RGB options are available for specialty applications.

faqs.question: How much energy do LED cabinet signs save versus fluorescent?
faqs.answer: LED cabinet signs typically consume 40-60% less energy than comparable fluorescent installations. The exact savings depend on the specific sign size and the fluorescent system being replaced. We can provide energy comparison estimates for your client presentations.

faqs.question: What warranty do you offer on LED components?
faqs.answer: Our standard LED warranty covers modules and power supplies for 5 years against manufacturing defects and premature lumen depreciation below the L70 threshold. Extended warranty options are available for projects requiring longer coverage periods.

title: Energy Efficient Cabinet Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale energy efficient cabinet signs with LED technology that cuts power usage by up to 60%. UL 48 listed, German-engineered. 3-week trade delivery.
heroSubtitle: Reduce your clients' energy costs with LED-powered cabinet signs that consume up to 60% less power than fluorescent alternatives. Wholesale pricing for the sign trade.

sections.heading: Energy Efficiency in Commercial Signage
sections.content:
Energy costs are a growing concern for commercial property owners, and illuminated signage represents a measurable line item on monthly utility bills. Sunlite Signs manufactures wholesale energy efficient cabinet signs that leverage modern LED technology to deliver significant power savings without sacrificing brightness or visibility.

Our energy efficient cabinet signs consume 40-60% less electricity than equivalent fluorescent cabinet signs. For businesses operating signs on dusk-to-dawn photocell timers — often 10-14 hours daily — the annual savings are substantial. This makes energy efficiency a strong selling point for sign shops when presenting upgrade proposals to existing clients or quoting new installations.

Beyond direct energy savings, LED-powered cabinet signs also reduce maintenance costs. LED modules are rated for 50,000+ hours of operation, which translates to 7-10 years of typical use before replacement is needed. Compare that to fluorescent tubes that require replacement every 2-3 years, and the total cost of ownership picture becomes even more compelling for your clients.

sections.heading: How We Achieve Maximum Efficiency
sections.content:
Energy efficiency in illuminated signage is not just about using LEDs — it requires thoughtful engineering of the entire lighting system. Sunlite Signs achieves industry-leading efficiency through:

  • Optimized module spacing that uses the minimum number of LED modules needed for uniform illumination, avoiding the common practice of over-populating cabinets
  • High-efficiency power supplies rated at 90%+ conversion efficiency, minimizing energy lost as heat
  • Reflective interior surfaces that maximize light utilization within the cabinet
  • Proper set-back distances calculated for each face material to achieve even light distribution without excess intensity

This engineering approach is part of our complimentary design service for trade partners. When you submit a project, our team calculates the most efficient lighting layout for the specific cabinet dimensions and face material, ensuring your client gets optimal brightness at the lowest possible energy consumption. All components are UL 48 listed for safety and code compliance.

sections.heading: Selling Energy Efficiency to Your Clients
sections.content:
For sign shops, energy efficient cabinet signs represent an upselling opportunity with tangible, quantifiable benefits. Sunlite Signs supports your sales process with energy comparison data that shows projected annual savings versus fluorescent alternatives. We can generate customized energy comparison documents for your client presentations, complete with estimated annual savings in kilowatt-hours and dollars.

Our 3-week production timeline and wholesale pricing make energy efficient cabinet signs a profitable product line for your shop. Whether you are proposing new installations, fluorescent-to-LED retrofits, or complete sign replacement programs for commercial property portfolios, Sunlite provides the engineering, manufacturing, and documentation support to help your shop close more business.

faqs.question: How much energy do LED cabinet signs save?
faqs.answer: Our LED cabinet signs typically consume 40-60% less energy than comparable fluorescent cabinet signs. Actual savings vary based on sign size, operating hours, and the specific fluorescent system being replaced.

faqs.question: Can you provide energy comparison data for client proposals?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide customized energy comparison documents that show projected annual savings in kilowatt-hours and estimated dollar savings based on your local utility rate. These documents help you demonstrate tangible ROI to your clients.

faqs.question: Are there utility rebates available for LED sign upgrades?
faqs.answer: Many utility companies offer commercial rebate programs for LED lighting upgrades, which can include illuminated signage. We recommend checking with your local utility provider, as rebate availability and amounts vary by region.

faqs.question: What is the payback period for upgrading to LED?
faqs.answer: Typical payback periods for fluorescent-to-LED retrofits range from 1-3 years depending on sign size, operating hours, and local energy rates. New LED cabinet signs versus new fluorescent cabinets typically pay back the price difference within the first year of operation.
